sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Conjunction / இணைப்புச்சொல்

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Of uncertain affinity; a conjugation, preposition and adverb of continuance, until (of time and place): - even (until, unto), (as) far (as), how long, (un-) til (-l), (hither-, un-, up) to, while (-s).
